We collaborate with professionals and business owners, enabling them to benefit from real estate investments such as cash flow, tax advantages, and long-term appreciation without the complexities of property management. Our approach is rooted in delivering consistent returns and long-term value to our partners. By leveraging our expertise, we aim to create reliable wealth-building opportunities through strategic real estate investments.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Role Description</strong></p><p>This is a full-time remote role for an Equity Partner at Onside Capital. As an Equity Partner, you will play a pivotal role in identifying investment opportunities, analyzing potential acquisitions, raising equity, and building strategic partnerships. Responsibilities also include overseeing financial performance, managing investor relations, performing market research, and contributing to the development of the firm's portfolio strategy while ensuring alignment with business goals.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><ul><li>Strong capabilities in Financial Analysis, Forecasting, and Budgeting</li><li>Proficiency in Market Research and Data Interpretation</li><li>Experience in Real Estate Investment and Portfolio Management</li><li>Excellent communication and relationship-building skills, particularly for maintaining investor relationships</li><li>Proven ability to negotiate and structure deals effectively</li><li>Strategic thinking and problem-solving skills to identify and capitalize on investment opportunities</li><li>High level of organizational and project management skills</li><li>A bachelorâs degree in Business, Finance, Real Estate, or related field; an advanced degree or relevant certifications (e.g., CFA, CAIA) is a plus</li><li>Prior experience in real estate investment or private equity is strongly preferred</li><li>Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and comfortable working in a remote environment</li></ul> sys admin, content writing, finance New Jersey, New Jersey, United States 2026-05-31T09:08:24+00:00 1132630 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-equity-partner-onside-capital-1132630 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Skilled Baker British Baker Employer b3 jobs Location West Sussex Salary c.
